description: Regression gold set for the lighting cluster. Each entry is a real, high-confidence conflict a human verified in the source PDFs. The eval asserts the pipeline keeps detecting each one (correct document pair, enough characteristic keywords, severity at least the floor). Keywords are accent-insensitive substring checks. Tune/extend as the corpus grows.

cases.name: maintenance-frequency-emergency-lighting
cases.note: Flagship conflict (README intro): emergency-lighting test/inspection cadence — 3/6 months vs 6/12 months.

cases.name: emergency-power-source-chantier-vs-general
cases.note: Emergency-lighting power source: self-contained units mandatory (chantier) vs central source allowed (general).

cases.name: interior-circulation-illuminance
cases.note: Indoor circulation illuminance: 10 lux (chantier) vs 50/100 lux (general).

cases.name: exterior-circulation-illuminance
cases.note: Outdoor circulation illuminance: 10 lux (chantier) vs 20 lux (general).

cases.name: emergency-power-source-chantier-vs-workplace
cases.note: Same power-source contradiction surfaced against the workplace lighting baseline.
